caption: A man wearing a white sleeveless shirt and dark trousers walks toward a white team bus parked under a red and white canopy. The bus prominently displays the text "Real Madrid" on its front. Several men in dark suits stand stationed around the entrance, acting as security or staff. One man in a suit stands in the foreground with his back partially to the camera, while another stands further back to the left and another to the right of the walkway. As the sequence progresses, the man in the white shirt moves from the center of the walkway toward the open door of the bus. The environment consists of a paved grey ground and brick walls. A small white logo is visible in the top right corner of the scene. The movement is steady and purposeful as the man approaches the vehicle.
